title: Bridge Essay: Neurocognitive bases of self-monitoring of inner speech in hallucination prone i

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Daimon** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Daimonic voice — voice-hearing continuum, inner speech misattribution, corollary discharge.

**Neurocognitive bases of self-monitoring of inner speech in hallucination prone individuals.**. Sci Rep.. PMID: 37069194. DOI: 10.1038/s41598-023-32042-4. Verbal hallucinations in schizophrenia patients might be seen as internal verbal productions mistaken for perceptions as aresult of over-salient inner speech and/or defective self-monitoring processes. Similar cognitive mechanisms might underpin verbal hallucination proneness in the general population.
